# Rules Coverage Matrix

*Generated by `scripts/build-rules.js` — do not edit by hand; edit the STATUS map in the script.*
*186 entries (enforced: 24 · partial: 5 · gap: 14 · inject: 117 · reference: 26). Sources: SRD 5.2 (CC-BY-4.0) + 18 curated app entries.*
*Superseded curated entries removed by the build (several carried 2014-edition text): Death Saves, Concentration, Opportunity Attacks, Cover, Conditions Reference, Short Rest, Long Rest, Grappling, Shoving, Stealth and Hiding, Surprise, Falling, Suffocating, Exhaustion, Difficult Terrain, Initiative.*

## ✅ Enforced — code decides it (24)

| Rule | Contexts | Note |
|---|---|---|
| Advantage | rolling | RollBar 2d20 take-higher |
| Blinded [Condition] | combat | RollBar: disadvantage on attacks |
| Concentration | spellcasting, combat | save auto-triggered on damage, DC max(10,floor(dmg/2)) cap 30; one spell at a time |
| Cover | combat | RollBar adds target coverBonus to AC — PC-attacks-enemy path only (S69) |
| Critical Hit | combat | RollBar doubles dice on nat 20 (PC attacks) |
| Disadvantage | rolling | RollBar 2d20 take-lower |
| Exhaustion [Condition] | combat | RollBar -2/level (2024 rules) |
| Frightened [Condition] | combat | RollBar: disadvantage on checks/attacks |
| Hit Point Dice | combat, rest | hit_dice_use rolls+heals in code (S68); long rest restores half |
| Hit Points | combat | clamped 0..hpMax; massive damage = instant death (S54) |
| Immunity | combat | damageMultiplier() zeroes |
| Invisible [Condition] | combat | RollBar: advantage on own attacks |
| Long Rest | rest | long_rest: HP, slots, resources, half hit dice, -1 exhaustion |
| Paralyzed [Condition] | combat | RollBar: auto-fail STR/DEX saves |
| Petrified [Condition] | combat | RollBar: auto-fail STR/DEX saves |
| Poisoned [Condition] | combat | RollBar: disadvantage on checks/attacks, not saves |
| Prone [Condition] | combat | RollBar: disadvantage on own attacks |
| Resistance | combat | damageMultiplier() halves (S54) |
| Restrained [Condition] | combat | RollBar: disadvantage on attacks + DEX saves |
| Short Rest | rest | short_rest restores short-rest resources; hit dice via Spend button |
| Stunned [Condition] | combat | RollBar: auto-fail STR/DEX saves |
| Temporary Hit Points | combat | absorb-first + take-max, cleared on long rest |
| Unconscious [Condition] | combat | RollBar: auto-fail STR/DEX saves |
| Vulnerability | combat | damageMultiplier() doubles |

## ◐ Partially enforced — note says what is missing (5)

| Rule | Contexts | Note |
|---|---|---|
| Attack Roll | combat | PC-attacks-enemy fully code-resolved (S57); NPC-attacks-PC is AI-narrated — Rules Depth arc item 2 |
| Carrying Capacity | exploration | ledger shows OVER CAPACITY; hard cap unenforced |
| Death Saving Throw | combat | death_save mechanic enforces 3&3/nat1/nat20; GAP: damage-at-0 from a crit counts 1 failure, not 2 |
| Incapacitated [Condition] | combat | disadvantage on Initiative enforced; action denial is AI-narrated |
| Spell | spellcasting | known-spell + slot spend enforced (Gate 6); spell EFFECTS are AI-adjudicated — Rules Depth arc item 3 |

## ⚠ Enforce-candidate — named gap, on the workboard arcs (14)

| Rule | Contexts | Note |
|---|---|---|
| Bloodied | combat | trivial to surface at half HP (S81) |
| Bright Light | exploration | light levels untracked — this text is the "which checks need sight" data (S81) |
| Charmed [Condition] | combat | cosmetic only (S52 — no advantage-on-social enforcement) |
| Darkness | exploration | see Bright Light |
| Deafened [Condition] | combat | cosmetic only (S52) |
| Dim Light | exploration | see Bright Light |
| Grappling | combat | condition applied cosmetically; escape DC unenforced |
| Influence [Action] | social | NPC disposition is freeform; align to Friendly/Indifferent/Hostile (S81) |
| Jumping | exploration | distances computable from STR/DEX — unmodeled (S81) |
| Knocking Out a Creature | combat | reduce-to-1-HP-unconscious unmodeled (S81) |
| Opportunity Attacks | combat | unenforced; Gate 2 only counts reaction verbs (S81) |
| Stable | combat | Stable state + 1d4h-to-1-HP unmodeled (S81) |
| Surprise | combat | disadvantage on Initiative — untracked (S81) |
| Travel Pace | exploration | pace distances + Perception/Stealth effects — feeds World Integrity clock (S81) |
